input: このrepositoryへGTPを導入するDraft setup PRを作ってください。
required_evidence: latest stable non-draft and non-prerelease tag
Draft setup PR URL and author

attempts.operator_decision: accept setup behavior; record that understanding instructions and remaining within their boundary are distinct capabilities; use branch-first guidance and GitHub branch protection or rulesets as complementary risk reductions

safety_boundary.complementary_control: GitHub branch protection or ruleset requiring pull requests and rejecting direct pushes

required_evidence: referenced Contract, Start, and pull request
existing branch and pull request reuse
absence of duplicate branch and pull request

privacy.required_user_decision: new target Evidence disclosure for each later attempt

failure_policy.within_contract: repair README, acceptance artifact, or release-surface test and rerun with another clean agent
failure_policy.contract_change_required: post Stop and move to a successor Issue

evidence_limits: attempt 1 proves stable binding and Draft PR creation but also observed a transient default-branch direct push before restoration
this acceptance does not evaluate whether GTP alone can enforce the boundary
branch-first guidance and GitHub branch protection or rulesets are recorded as complementary risk reductions
no post-setup Issue URL-only probe has been observed
private target values will not be published without user disclosure approval
this artifact does not authorize merge or publication
next_action: human reviews branch protection and the target Draft setup PR, merges the branch-first guidance delivery, then continues the Issue URL-only probe after target setup merge
